events.label: assistant
events.text: Written to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: pulling long feeder/branch runs without lubricant risks exceeding pulling tension/sidewall pressure limits, jamming, and abrading conductor insulation — which can erase the color-coding and identification required by NEC 200.6/210.5. Decision is `fail` (medium risk) with corrective actions: use a compatible pulling lubricant, monitor tension, and verify identification markings survive the pull before proceeding.
